assertions.fullName: CVF v1.9 replay conformance replays exactly when context is unchanged
CVF v1.9 replay conformance reports drift when replay context changed
CVF v1.9 replay conformance fails closed for unknown execution records
CVF v1.9 cross-extension audit replay conformance replays a v1.7.1 authorized audit record exactly when context is unchanged
CVF v1.9 cross-extension audit replay conformance reports drift when cross-extension replay context changes
CVF v1.9 cross-extension audit replay conformance fails closed for unauthorized resume audit linkage
CVF v1.9 cross-extension workflow resume conformance resumes a validated v1.7.1 checkpoint into v1.9 replay when session and token match
CVF v1.9 cross-extension workflow resume conformance fails closed when cross-extension resume token does not match the checkpoint
CVF v1.9 cross-extension workflow resume conformance fails closed when checkpoint is not in resumable validated state
CVF v1.9 cross-extension recovery orchestration conformance resumes workflow when no rollback record is present
CVF v1.9 cross-extension recovery orchestration conformance returns rollback-required when a matching v1.8 rollback record exists
CVF v1.9 cross-extension recovery orchestration conformance fails closed when rollback snapshot does not match replay seed snapshot
CVF v1.9 cross-extension failure classification conformance classifies runtime interruption without resuming workflow
CVF v1.9 cross-extension failure classification conformance classifies policy refusal without attempting resume
CVF v1.9 cross-extension failure classification conformance classifies system abort without attempting resume
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation policy conformance attaches an informational remediation plan to successful resume
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation policy conformance attaches a critical human-gated remediation plan to rollback-required outcomes
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation policy conformance attaches a refusal-specific remediation plan for policy refusal outcomes
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation execution conformance executes automated remediation steps for resumed outcomes
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation execution conformance executes automated remediation steps for interrupted outcomes
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation execution conformance fails closed for human-gated rollback-required remediation
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation adapter conformance emits adapter receipts for resumed remediation steps
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation adapter conformance emits adapter receipts for interrupted remediation steps
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation adapter conformance keeps human-gated rollback-required remediation blocked even when an adapter is present
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation file-backed adapter conformance persists resumed remediation receipts into a file-backed artifact
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation file-backed adapter conformance appends interrupted remediation receipts without losing prior runtime artifacts
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation file-backed adapter conformance keeps rollback-required remediation blocked and leaves the file-backed artifact untouched
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation release adapter conformance writes both machine-readable and markdown remediation evidence for resumed outcomes
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation release adapter conformance updates markdown evidence after interrupted remediation without losing prior receipts
CVF v1.9 cross-extension remediation release adapter conformance keeps release evidence absent for rollback-required outcomes
